external_review_control.allowed_scope: Modify only this qualification JSON and the existing frozen-definition JSON, then request delta external review.

context_only_audit_evidence.description: PR 94 terminal and result-first research program
Broad mechanism pool and narrow formal validation addendum

lineage_evidence.duplicate_adjudication: NO_EXACT_DUPLICATE. US46 is fixed-weight QQQ/GLD failure memory, while the current line is an eight-mechanism scheduled-event development atlas. Infrastructure improvements cannot reopen US46.

prior_local_qualification.relevant_finding: The existing accepted-session research calendar covers only 2018-01-02 through 2026-07-06 and is explicitly PIT-unqualified; it cannot cover the 1994-2009 development split.

existing_tlt.development_pre_inception: 1994-01-01 through 2002-07-21 is structurally unavailable for TLT and may not be synthesized

read_only_local_evidence.expiration_identity: No complete accepted official historical standard monthly and quarterly expiration snapshot exists locally.

source_routes_identified_not_ingested.component: FOMC dates, materials and statement timing
TLT official product identity and inception

required: official materialized FOMC events with exact actual statement timestamps and revision identity
SPY one-minute RTH OHLCV with corporate-action-complete identity covering applicable 1994-2009 windows
accepted 1994-2009 NYSE calendar with actual opens, closes and early or unscheduled closures
observed: official Federal Reserve archive route identified but no accepted materialized event table
zero local SPY minute rows; only retrospective daily SPY rows are present
canonical calendar empty and research-only calendar begins in 2018

required: SPY daily raw open and close plus adjusted open and close with accepted split and cash-distribution identity
official materialized FOMC, CPI and Employment Situation actual event identities
accepted standard monthly and quarterly expiration identities
accepted 1994-2009 NYSE calendar with actual opens, closes and early or unscheduled closures
observed: The 1994-01-03 through 2009-12-31 SPY development slice has 4030 distinct dates, complete raw and adjusted OHLC, volume, cash-distribution and split-factor fields, one snapshot identity and 4030 distinct row hashes; available_at remains null and the snapshot is retrospective-only input not yet accepted for this lane
BLS, Federal Reserve, OCC and SEC official archive or rule routes are identified but no accepted event table is materialized
exchange_calendars can generate a version-pinned historical XNYS candidate calendar, but it remains secondary and must be reconciled to SPY dates plus official exception evidence
canonical calendar is empty and no accepted complete historical expiration identity exists locally

required: official materialized Treasury quarterly-refunding events with exact actual timestamps and revision identity
TLT one-minute extended-hours OHLCV with corporate-action-complete identity from 2002-07-22 through 2009
observed: official Treasury archive route identified but no accepted materialized event table
zero local TLT minute rows and pre-inception events cannot be synthesized

decisive_blockers: Lane A lacks qualified FOMC timestamps, SPY minute data and a 1994-2009 NYSE calendar.

Lane B has a complete-shaped retrospective SPY development slice with immutable snapshot and row identities, but it remains unaccepted for this lane and lacks materialized official event and expiration identities plus an accepted 1994-2009 NYSE calendar.
Lane C lacks qualified Treasury timestamps, TLT extended-hours minute data and a contemporaneous extended-session schedule.
TLT did not exist before 2002-07-22 and that interval cannot be synthesized or replaced.
Daily bars remain forbidden substitutes for the intraday windows in Lane A and Lane C.

terminal_adjudication.why_no_module: All three lanes are currently input-blocked. Without an executable qualified lane, an event-return module would be unused mainline code and could silently harden unverified assumptions. The smallest honest checkpoint remains the frozen definition plus this fail-closed lane qualification.
terminal_adjudication.next_decision: Delta external review must accept the revised definition before any provider or data acquisition. After acceptance, qualify Lane B first because its mechanisms use daily data; no implementation or outcome begins until that lane independently qualifies.

validation.git_scope: exactly this qualification file and the frozen definition file
